calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Adjudging Eva Sulcova As Owner Of Interest In Personal Property
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Penelope Brown for Eva Sulcova (Petitioner). Cynthia Vroom for Regents of University of California.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issues raised in the opposition filed by Ms. Sulcova. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Adjudging Eva Sulcova As Owner Of Interest In Personal Property
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Continued To Apr-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Vroom for University of California. Penelope Brown appeared by telphone for Petitioner.

Ms. Brown stated that she would like the opportunity to reply in writing and requested a continuance. The Petition for Order Adjudging Eva Sulcova As Owner of Interest In Personal Property was continued to April 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Brown intends to make a personal appearance.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
Continued From 5/12 To 5/26: 1st, Final Acct & Rept, Petn For Its Settl, Final Distrib, Allow Of Comm & Fees
